title: Polystichum patens
taxonomy: Polystichum patens is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It belongs to the genus Polystichum, which is a group of evergreen ferns. This classification puts Polystichum patens within the larger division of vascular plants, known as the Tracheophyta. The fern's classification also places it within the kingdom Plantae. Its specific classification can be broken down further into its binomial nomenclature: Polystichum patens.
